text: 9. Subcontractor shall provide fall protection as required to complete the Work including, but not limited to, all required scaffolding,  snorkel  lifts,  lanyards,  tie-off  points,  safety  lines,  anchors  and  harnesses  as  required  by  the  AHJ. Subcontractor  shall  provide  access  for  inspections  of  their  Work.  Subcontractor  shall  provide  all  required certifications and keep on hand while working on-site.
